title: Tapioca DAO - Rekt
relevance_summary: Private key compromise leading to token and stablecoin theft via contract ownership transfer

prevention.rule: Block any tx that transfers ownership of a contract and then immediately calls a mint function.

red_flags: Immediate contract ownership transfer followed by minting function call
summary: Tapioca DAO suffered a $4.4 million loss due to a private key compromise that allowed the attacker to transfer ownership of the TAP token vesting contract and mint USDO tokens. A guard could have prevented this by blocking transactions that transfer contract ownership and immediately call a mint function.
